title: dysoxylum setosum
intro: Dysoxylum setosum, also known as the Philippine ash tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The extracts from this plant have been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, while also providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the bark of Dysoxylum setosum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
